redaction: No address, phone, email, wallet, payment, tracking, or order-logistics details are stored.
assumptions: Cert numbers are null unless visible on a verified platform/cert image.
Visible values come from current workspace captures and may be stale until sold-comp validation is refreshed.
Recommendations are educational scenario analysis, not financial advice or guaranteed profit.

cards.title: 2022 One Piece Starter Deck ST03-The Seven Warlords of the Sea #001 Crocodile Super Pre-Release
cards.set: Starter Deck ST03-The Seven Warlords of the Sea
cards.recommendation: Hold through OP14/EB04 Warlords attention; only sell into a Crocodile/Warlords premium or upgrade opportunity.
cards.riskNotes: PSA 9 caps upside versus PSA 10. Crocodile demand is meaningful but below Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Roger, Ace, Sabo, and Shanks.

cards.title: 2025 One Piece Japanese Promo 3rd Anniversary Treasure SR Monkey D. Luffy #ST10-006
cards.recommendation: Core hold. Luffy plus promo/anniversary context is the strongest thematic fit in the current book.
cards.riskNotes: Japanese modern promos can reprice quickly. CGC 10 may not clear as easily as PSA 10 in some channels.

cards.title: 2024 One Piece Japanese SD Purple Monkey D. Luffy SR Zoro-Juurou #ST18-004
cards.set: Starter Deck 18: Purple Monkey D. Luffy
cards.recommendation: Core hold. It fits the Zoro identity and pristine label angle; do not average up unless comps prove demand.
cards.riskNotes: Starter deck supply can be more flexible than event promos, pre-release cards, or top chase rarities.

cards.title: 2023 One Piece Promo Premium Collection Film Red Alt Art Franky #OP01-021
cards.set: Premium Card Collection - One Piece Film Red Edition
cards.recommendation: Watch. Sell or trade if it helps fund Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Roger, Ace, Sabo, Shanks, or Mihawk targets.
cards.riskNotes: Franky is loved but generally less liquid than the main chase characters.

cards.title: 2023 One Piece Promo Tournament Pack Volume 3 Nami #ST01-007
cards.recommendation: Hold until arrival, then verify sold comps. Sell only if a buyer pays near high comps or if proceeds upgrade into PSA 10/CGC 10 Nami.
cards.riskNotes: CGC 9 is not a trophy grade; the $400 Collectr value should be treated as visible value, not guaranteed cash.

cards.title: 2024 One Piece Starter Deck ST18-Purple Monkey D. Luffy #041 Monkey D. Luffy
cards.set: Starter Deck 18: Purple Monkey D. Luffy
cards.recommendation: Keep if building one big Courtyard shipment. Do not chase more PSA 9 modern starter/promos without verified comps.
cards.riskNotes: Modern PSA 9s can be common and may not justify shipping/capital if off-plan.

cards.title: 2024 One Piece OP08-Two Legends #023 Carrot
cards.recommendation: First sell/trade candidate if space or cash is needed before shipping.
cards.riskNotes: PSA 10 helps, but Carrot is not core to the Luffy/Zoro/Warlords/Roger/Ace/Sabo thesis.

cards.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! The Dark Magicians
cards.recommendation: Sell or trade into One Piece priority targets or cash reserve.
cards.riskNotes: Mixed-IP inventory makes the One Piece thesis harder to measure.

nextBuyTargets.target: OP13 Sabo PSA 10 / key alternate art
nextBuyTargets.why: Pairs with Luffy/Ace family thesis and current offer book already has an attractive PSA 10 Sabo bid.

nextBuyTargets.target: ST29 Egghead Luffy Black & White alternate art, preferably PSA 10 if priced rationally
nextBuyTargets.why: Main-character current-cycle demand; avoid overpaying PSA 9 if PSA 10 spread is too narrow.

nextBuyTargets.target: OP09 Gol D. Roger higher grade / iconic arts
nextBuyTargets.why: Franchise apex character and broadly legible to collectors.

nextBuyTargets.target: OP14/EB04 Dracule Mihawk, Crocodile, Boa Hancock, and Warlords leaders
nextBuyTargets.why: Official OP14/EB04 theme directly strengthens your Crocodile/Warlords lane.

nextBuyTargets.target: English Version 3rd Anniversary Set at or near MSRP
nextBuyTargets.why: Official August 2026 product with Luffy/Ace/Sabo supply goods and cards; avoid aftermarket hype premiums.

nextBuyTargets.target: Nami PSA 10 / CGC 10 liquid promo or early set chase
nextBuyTargets.why: Nami is the current value anchor; upgrade grade/liquidity rather than adding more low-grade exposure.
